hero.title: The complete fibre optic stack. Made in Mumbai.
hero.subtitle: Active components, passive assemblies, cable management, and test equipment — manufactured and tested in-house since 1985.

sections.heading: SFP Transceivers, OLP & High-Speed Interfaces
sections.intro: Manufactured and tested at our Mumbai facility. Compatible with major OEM switches, routers, and DWDM platforms.

cards.name: Fiber Optic Transceivers (SFP)
cards.blurb: High performance and cost effective modules for serial optical data communication applications.

cards.name: Smart SFP Transceiver
cards.blurb: Next-gen transceivers with integrated OAM and performance monitoring.

cards.name: 400G
cards.blurb: Next-generation 400G high-capacity optical transceiver for hyperscale connectivity.

cards.name: 100G & 100G BIDI
cards.blurb: High-density 100G QSFP28 modules for enterprise and carrier routing applications.

cards.name: 40G
cards.blurb: Reliable 40G QSFP+ transceivers for mid-tier aggregation networks.

cards.name: 25G & 25G BIDI
cards.blurb: 25G SFP28 modules ideal for 5G fronthaul and data center server connectivity.

cards.name: SFP+ 10G BIDI
cards.blurb: Bi-directional 10G transceivers utilizing a single fiber to double cable plant efficiency.

cards.name: SFP+ 10G Dual Fiber
cards.blurb: Standard dual-fiber 10G modules for enterprise LAN, SAN, and edge routing.

cards.name: 1G SFP BIDI
cards.blurb: Cost-effective 1G bi-directional transceivers for access networks and FTTH deployments.

cards.name: 1G SFP Dual Fiber
cards.blurb: Standard 1G dual-fiber modules compatible with legacy optical equipment.

cards.name: Copper SFP+
cards.blurb: RJ-45 based transceiver module for Ethernet links over Cat6a/Cat7 cables.

cards.name: Bypass Switch
cards.blurb: Optical path control equipment which can automatic bypass the optical path in case the protected optical device is failure.

cards.name: Optical Line Protection System
cards.blurb: Uses spare optical fiber from different route to build a backup path for network protection.

cards.name: Direct Attached Cable (DAC)
cards.blurb: SFP-10G-DAC hot-swappable direct attach copper cable assembly (Twinax Cable) with SFP+ connectors.

cards.name: Active Optical Cable (AOC)
cards.blurb: 100G QSFP28 AOC assemblies offer a highly reliable and cost-effective alternative to transceiver assemblies.

cards.name: HD-SDI Optical Transceiver
cards.blurb: PDR8010SG SD/HD/3G-SDI broadcasting grade HD Transceiver which can interconvert SD/HD/3G-SDI signals.

cards.name: PoE Injector
cards.blurb: Power over Ethernet injector for optical networking and broadcasting applications.

sections.heading: Cable Assemblies, Adapters, WDM & Splitters
sections.intro: Precision-terminated and interferometry-tested. Available in standard and custom configurations.

sections.heading: Termination Boxes, ODFs & Splice Closures
